Terrifier 2 (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $10,962,502Details
International Box Office $4,724,432
Worldwide Box Office $15,686,934
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,161,582
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,592,309
Total $4,753,891
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After being resurrected by a sinister entity, Art the Clown returns to the timid town of Miles County where he targets a teenage girl and her younger brother on Halloween night.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$805,000 (7.3% of total gross)
Legs:5.75 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:69.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$250,000 (worldwide box office is 62.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:886 opening theaters/1,550 max. theaters, 3.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $12,437,515

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 6th, 2022 (Wide) by Iconic/Cineverse
November 1st, 2023 (Special Engagement) by Iconic Releasing
International Releases: October 17th, 2022 (Limited), released as Terrifier 2 (Ужасающий 2) (Russia (CIS))
October 27th, 2022 (Wide) (Australia)
November 10th, 2022 (Wide) (Finland)
November 10th, 2022 (Wide) (Croatia)
December 1st, 2022 (Limited) (New Zealand)
Video Release: November 11th, 2022 by Screambox
Running Time: 138 minutes
Franchise: Terrifier
Social setting: Halloween
Subgenre: Slasher Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
